Part.Source: Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAPRECO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &TabelaPrecoNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &PadRotLin = 'ATPRC' + trim(Str(&EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PadDtaMod) &sdtAtualizaPreco.FromJson(&PadObs) &AtualizarMarKup = true padraoUsuario.Call('L', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObsMark, &PadDtaMod) if &PadObsMark = '0' &AtualizarMarKup = false endif retornaTabelaColunaFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FilTabCod, &FiltabColCod) &filtTabCod = &FilTabCod for Each Order EmpCod, TabCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where TabCod = &FilTabCod &TabUltAlt = TabUltAlt Exit EndFor if &TabUltAlt <= 0 &TabUltAlt = 1 EndIF &IsSel.Enabled = 1 AvisoMar.ForeColor = RGB(0,70,170) For Each Order EmpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod &Pln1TabCod = Pln1TabCod &VlrPln1TabCod.Title = 'T.' + trim(Pln1TabCod) &Pln2TabCod = Pln2TabCod &VlrPln2TabCod.Title = 'T.' + trim(Pln2TabCod) &Pln3TabCod = Pln3TabCod &VlrPln3TabCod.Title = 'T.' + trim(Pln3TabCod) &Pln4TabCod = Pln4TabCod &VlrPln4TabCod.Title = 'T.' + trim(Pln4TabCod) If Pln1TabCod.IsEmpty() &vlrPln1TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If Pln2TabCod.IsEmpty() &vlrPln2TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If Pln3TabCod.IsEmpty() &vlrPln3TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If Pln4TabCod.IsEmpty() &vlrPln4TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF Exit EndFor &UmConRaz = 'Conc_1' &DoisConProVlr.Visible = 0 &UmConProVlr.Visible = 0 For Each Order ConEmpCod, ConCod Where ConEmpCod = &EmpCod Where ConIsAtv = true Do Case Case &UmConCod.IsEmpty() &UmConCod = ConCod &UmConRaz = Substr(ConRaz,1,10) &UmConProVlr.Visible = 1 CAse &DoisConCod.IsEmpty() &DoisConProVlr.Visible = 1 &DoisConProVlr.Title = Substr(ConRaz,1,10) &DoisConCod = ConCod Otherwise Exit EndCase EndFor &UmConProVlr.Title = &UmConRaz /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &ActionsData = new() &ActionsDataItem = new() &ActionsDataItem.Title = 'Editar Colunas' &ActionsDataItem.Icon = EditColumns.Link() &ActionsDataItem.EventKey = !'Colunas' &ActionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionsData.Add(&ActionsDataItem) &ActionsDataItem = new() &ActionsDataItem.Title = 'Concorrentes' &ActionsDataItem.Link = WWConcorrente.Link() &ActionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionsData.Add(&ActionsDataItem) &ActionsDataItem = new() &ActionsDataItem.Title = 'Setores' &ActionsDataItem.Link = WWSetor.Link() &ActionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionsData.Add(&ActionsDataItem) &ActionsDataItem = new() &ActionsDataItem.Title = 'Tabelas Preço' &ActionsDataItem.EventKey = !'Tabelas' &ActionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionsData.Add(&ActionsDataItem) &ActionsDataItem = new() &ActionsDataItem.Title = 'Valores Custo' &ActionsDataItem.EventKey = !'Custos' &ActionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionsData.Add(&ActionsDataItem) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'InicializaColunas' &NovoPreco.Enabled = 1 &PedCod = &ParPedCod For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod &AuxxPedCliCodRaz = Substr(PedCliCodRaz, 1, 30) &AuxxPedCod = PedCod Exit EndFor EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount ProRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod retornaTabelaColunaFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FilTabCod, &FiltabColCod) &filtTabCod = &FilTabCod EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load RetornaProdutosAfetadosCusto.call(EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &IsProdutosAfetados) &ProdutosAfetados.Visible = &IsProdutosAfetados /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProdutosAfetados = !'' &PrecosProduto = !'' &PedQtd = PedQtd ProRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts = Status_Produto.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ ProNom.Link = VerProduto.Link('DashBoard', EmpCod, ProCod) ProNom.LinkTarget = '_blank' if &UmConCod <> 0 RetornaValorConcorrente.Call(&EmpCod, &UmConCod, ProCod, &UmConProVlr) EndiF If &DoisConCod <> 0 RetornaValorConcorrente.Call(&EmpCod, &DoisConCod, ProCod, &DoisConProVlr) EndIF &UmConProVlr.ForeColor = RGB(200,130,0) &DoisConProVlr.ForeColor = RGB(200,130,0) &vlrPln1TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln2TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln3TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln4TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) If not &Pln1TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln1TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln1TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln1TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) EndIF If not &Pln2TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln2TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln2TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln2TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln2TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If not &Pln3TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln3TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln3TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln3TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln3TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If not &Pln4TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln4TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln4TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln4TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln4TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF &TabPrc1 = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &filtTabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod do 'getPrecoSelecaoSDT' //SUGESTAO //Preco Sugestao &ProNovPrc = 0 &ProVlrCus = ProVlrCus if PedVlrCus > 0 do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrCus > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrCus / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus EndCase else do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrUntDsc > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrUntDsc / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc EndCase EndIf IF &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 and ProIMCTot > 0 &ProNovPrc = round(&PedVlrUntComDsc / (ProIMCTot/100) ,2) EndIF &ProNovPrc.Tooltiptext = '[Nv.Custo] / ([Mark.]/100)' &TabPrc1.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) if &TabPrc1 < &ProNovPrc &TabPrc1.ForeColor = RGB(250,0,0) EndIF &ProNovPrc.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) //ProIMCTot_Formula.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) // If &ProNovPrc <= &PedVlrUntComDsc // &ProNovPrc.ForeColor = RGB(250,0,0) // ProIMCTot_Formula.ForeColor = RGB(250,0,0) // EndIF //Despesa Sugestao IF ProImcTotDsp > 0 and &ProNovPrc > 0 &ProImcVlrTotDsp = &ProNovPrc * (ProImcTotDsp/100) Else &ProImcVlrTotDsp = 0 EndIf &ProImcVlrTotDsp.Tooltiptext = 'Desp: '+trim(ProImcTotDsp.ToFormattedString()) + '% da [Sug.]' &ProImcVlrTotDsp.ForeColor = RGB(130,0,0) //Lucro Sugestao &LucroCalc = &ProNovPrc - (&PedVlrUntComDsc + &ProImcVlrTotDsp) &LucroCalc.Tooltiptext = 'Lucro: '+trim(ProImcMarLuc.ToFormattedString()) + '% da [Sug.]' &LucroCalc.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,250) if &NovoPreco <= 0 &NovoPreco= &ProNovPrc EndIF //NOVO PRECO IF ProImcTotDsp <= 0 or &NovoPreco <= 0 &NovaDespesa = 0 Else &NovaDespesa = &NovoPreco * (ProImcTotDsp/100) EndIF &NovoLucro = round(&NovoPreco - (&PedVlrUntComDsc + &NovaDespesa),2) &NovaDespesa.ForeColor = RGB(130,0,0) &NovoLucro.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,250) &NovaMark = 0 &NovoAcre= 0 if &NovoPreco > 0 and &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 &NovaMark = round(((&PedVlrUntComDsc /&NovoPreco) * 100),2) &NovoAcre = round(100 - ((&NovoPreco / &PedVlrUntComDsc) * 100), 2) EndIF if &NovaMark < 0 or &NovaMark > 100 &NovaMark = 0 EndiF if &NovoAcre < 0 &NovoAcre = &NovoAcre * -1 EndIF EndEvent Event Enter if &AtualizarMarKup.ToString() <> &PadObsMark &PadObsMark = trim(&AtualizarMarKup.ToString()) padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObsMark, &PadDtaMod) EndIf padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PadDtaMod) &sdtAtualizaPreco.FromJson(&PadObs) RetornaColunasTabelas.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &filtTabCod, &TabPerCol, &TabPerCol2, &TabPerCol3,&TabPerCol4,&TabPerCol5,&TabPerCol6,&TabPerCol7,&TabPerCol8,&TabPerCol9,&tem1,&tem2,&tem3,&tem4,&tem5,&tem6,&tem7,&tem8,&tem9) For &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.IsSel = true &AuxTabPrc1 = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 If &TabIsPerCol1 = true if &TabPerCol2 <> 0 &TabPrc2 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol2/100),2) Else &TabPrc2 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &TabPerCol3 <> 0 &TabPrc3 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol3/100),2) Else &TabPrc3 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &TabPerCol4 <> 0 &TabPrc4 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol4/100),2) Else &TabPrc4 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &TabPerCol5 <> 0 &TabPrc5 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol5/100),2) Else &TabPrc5 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &TabPerCol6 <> 0 &TabPrc6 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol6/100),2) Else &TabPrc6 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &TabPerCol7 <> 0 &TabPrc7 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol7/100),2) Else &TabPrc7 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &TabPerCol8 <> 0 &TabPrc8 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol8/100),2) Else &TabPrc8 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &TabPerCol9 <> 0 &TabPrc9 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol9/100),2) Else &TabPrc9 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF Else if &TabPerCol2 <> 0 &TabPrc2 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol2/100),2) Else &TabPrc2 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &TabPerCol3 <> 0 &TabPrc3 = round(&TabPrc2 + (&TabPrc2 * &TabPerCol3/100),2) Else &TabPrc3 = &TabPrc2 EndIF if &TabPerCol4 <> 0 &TabPrc4 = round(&TabPrc3 + (&TabPrc3 * &TabPerCol4/100),2) Else &TabPrc4 = &TabPrc3 EndIF if &TabPerCol5 <> 0 &TabPrc5 = round(&TabPrc4 + (&TabPrc4 * &TabPerCol5/100),2) Else &TabPrc5 = &TabPrc4 EndIF if &TabPerCol6 <> 0 &TabPrc6 = round(&TabPrc5 + (&TabPrc5 * &TabPerCol6/100),2) Else &TabPrc6 = &TabPrc5 EndIF if &TabPerCol7 <> 0 &TabPrc7 = round(&TabPrc6 + (&TabPrc6 * &TabPerCol7/100),2) Else &TabPrc7 = &TabPrc6 EndIF if &TabPerCol8 <> 0 &TabPrc8 = round(&TabPrc7 + (&TabPrc7 * &TabPerCol8/100),2) Else &TabPrc8 = &TabPrc7 EndIF if &TabPerCol9 <> 0 &TabPrc9 = round(&TabPrc8 + (&TabPrc8 * &TabPerCol9/100),2) Else &TabPrc9 = &TabPrc8 EndIF EndIF &TabProDtaIni.SetEmpty() &TabProDtaFin.SetEmpty() GravaProdutoNaTabela.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &filtTabCod, &TabUltAlt, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod, 'ADD', &TabProDtaIni, &TabProDtaFin, &AuxTabPrc1, &TabPrc2, &TabPrc3, &TabPrc4, &TabPrc5,&TabPrc6,&TabPrc7,&TabPrc8,&TabPrc9, &Context.UserName) if &AtualizarMarKup = true if &AuxTabPrc1 > 0 and &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus > 0 &novaMargem = (&sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus / &AuxTabPrc1) * 100 Do Case Case &novaMargem < 0 &novaMargem = 0 Case &novaMargem > 100 &novaMargem = 99.99 EndCase EndiF GravaIMC.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod, 0, 0, 0, 0, &novaMargem, true) Endif EndIF EndFor padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wwPlanilhaCustoPedido.Link(&PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoDoVoltarPDV' wwPedidoCompra.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For Each Line in grid &IsSel = true &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod do 'SalvaSelecao' EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoDesMarcar' padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wwPlanilhaCustoPedido.Link(&PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Actions.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Actions.ActiveEventKey = !'Colunas' Do 'Do Colunas' Case ddo_Actions.ActiveEventKey = !'Tabelas' Do 'Do Tabelas' Case ddo_Actions.ActiveEventKey = !'Custos' Do 'Do Custos' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Colunas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpSelecColumPlani.PopUp() Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Tabelas' ConfgPlanilhaCusto.Popup(TrnMode.Update, &EmpCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Custos' wpIMC.Popup(&ProSetCod, &GrupHie, 0) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROREF" &ProRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROREF", "", not &ProRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &IsSel.Click &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod do 'SalvaSelecao' EndEvent Event &IsSel.IsValid &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod do 'SalvaSelecao' EndEvent Event &NovoPreco.IsValid do 'CalculaDespesaLucroNovo' EndEvent Event ProSetTaxMo.Click wpSetor.Popup(EmpCod, ProSetCod) Refresh EndEvent Event ProImcMarLuc.Click wpIMC.Popup(0, '', ProCod) Refresh EndEvent Event &ProdutosAfetados.Click wpProdutosAfetadosAumentoCusto.Popup(EmpCod, PedCod, FilCod, PedItmCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) EndEvent Event &PrecosProduto.Click wpProdutosPrecosNovo.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod, ProCod, 0) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'getPrecoSelecaoSDT' &IsSel= false &NovoPreco = 0 For &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod and &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &NovoPreco = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 &IsSel = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.IsSel EndIF EndFor EndSub Sub 'SalvaSelecao' &isAChou = false for &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod and &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &isAChou = true &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.IsSel = &IsSel &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 = &NovoPreco &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus = &ProVlrCus Exit EndIF EndFor if &isAChou = false &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem = new() &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.IsSel = &IsSel &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 = &TabPrc1 &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus = &ProVlrCus &sdtAtualizaPreco.Add(&sdtAtualizaPrecoItem) EndiF padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtAtualizaPreco.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) EndSub Sub 'CalculaDespesaLucroNovo' &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod IF ProImcTotDsp <= 0 or &NovoPreco <= 0 &NovaDespesa = 0 Else &NovaDespesa = &NovoPreco * (ProImcTotDsp/100) EndIF &NovoLucro = round(&NovoPreco - (&PedVlrUntComDsc + &NovaDespesa),2) &NovaMark = 0 &NovoAcre= 0 if &NovoPreco > 0 and &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 &NovaMark = round(((&PedVlrUntComDsc /&NovoPreco) * 100),2) &NovoAcre = round(100 - ((&NovoPreco / &PedVlrUntComDsc) * 100), 2) EndIF if &NovaMark < 0 or &NovaMark > 100 &NovaMark = 0 EndiF if &NovoAcre < 0 &NovoAcre = &NovoAcre * -1 EndIF do 'SalvaSelecao' EndSub Sub 'InicializaColunas' ProNom.Visible = 1 ProImcCusInd.Visible = 0 ProImcDesVen.Visible = 0 ProImcDesAdm.Visible = 0 ProImcDesFin.Visible = 0 // ProIMCTot_Formula.Visible = 1 PadraoUsuario.call('L', 'WPSELECCOLUMOPLANI', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() if &PadObs.Substring(1,1) <> 'S' ProNom.Visible = 0 EndIF if &PadObs.Substring(4,1) = 'S' ProImcCusInd.Visible = 1 EndIf if &PadObs.Substring(7,1) = 'S' ProImcDesVen.Visible = 1 EndIf if &PadObs.Substring(8,1) = 'S' ProImcDesAdm.Visible = 1 EndIf if &PadObs.Substring(9,1) = 'S' ProImcDesFin.Visible = 1 EndIf // if &PadObs.Substring(11,1) <> 'S' // ProIMCTot_Formula.Visible = 0 // EndIf EndIF EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
